title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 537.320 - Judgment — execution
text:
537.320.  Judgment — execution. — Whenever judgment shall be rendered against any person or persons, under the provisions of sections 537.300 to 537.320, by any associate circuit judge or circuit judge, an execution shall issue thereon against the goods and chattels of any such defendant or defendants.
(RSMo 1939 § 14497, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12823; 1919 § 4313; 1909 § 814 
Effective 1-02-79
